Title: The Spike and Drop in Retail Sales: Are We Actually Measuring Them?
Excerpt: Retail sales data isn't just noisyŚit is non-stationary and dynamic. While dashboards highlight "spikes and drops," most models inadvertently smooth these movements away by assuming behavior remains stable within fixed windows. This creates a dangerous gap where we predict sales reasonably well but understand the underlying drivers poorly. To fix this, we must shift from generalized averages toward adaptive measurement, segregating stable periods from volatile shifts.
